description: A protein-forward pork chop typically served as a satisfying main dish with sides or sauces.
preparation_steps: Cook to the desired doneness or tenderness
Rest or plate with sides and serve

health_advice.benefits: Can provide strong satiety, protein, and a satisfying main-meal centerpiece.
health_advice.risks: Rich cuts, salty sauces, or larger portions can drive up calories and saturated fat.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Pair with vegetables, smart sides, and appropriate portions for a more balanced meal.

dietary_notes.note: Sides, sauces, and breading can change the final dietary profile
